rootCauseHypothesis:
TEST BLOCKED: Result of verification against the USER REQUEST:

Summary: The Results tab for the selected campaign rendered a clear empty-performance state and satisfies the requested assertions.

Verification checklist (each item mapped to evidence visible on the page/screenshot):
1) Results tab renders (not blank / not an error / not stuck loading): PASS — the Results view content is visible (metric tiles, banner, empty-state card, and explanatory sections) with no blank area or loading spinner present.

2) Attribution / data-source note explaining modeled/mock metrics: PASS — the banner text is visible and reads: "Mock data. Connect owned-destination analytics + signup attribution (UTMs) for real conversions; platform APIs where available." (present immediately under campaign header).

3) Metric tiles visible for Impressions, Clicks, Signups, Activated, Paid, and Modeled pipeline, even with zero values: PASS — the tiles are shown and display values: "Impressions 0", "Clicks 0", "Signups 0", "Activated 0", "Paid 0", and "Modeled pipeline $0" (with the note "at $120/signup").

4) No-published-posts empty state visible and explanatory: PASS — the page shows the message: "No published posts yet. Approve an asset to publish it — its post and metrics land here, grouped by platform." which explains that approved/published assets will appear here after publishing.

Notes and scope: The test explicitly did not require charts, value-per-signup slider, post-level detail, or Route wins controls for this empty-data test; those elements are not required and were not asserted here. No login or additional navigation was necessary.

Result: PASS — the Results tab displays a clear empty-performance state with the required attribution and metric tiles.

All findings are based solely on the visible UI (page content and screenshot) from this session.
